text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh, welcome back, Special Week.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You're here already?! Ahaha…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait, those shoes… Are you going for a run?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, it's my daily routine.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that right? …Ah.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I wonder if she'd let me run with her again if I asked.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maybe when she gets back, I'll work up the courage to ask. 
Then afterwards… Hee hee!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (That's right. I was thinking of asking her if I could come… too.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Although… What if running together is only fun for me? 
What if I… just get in her way?)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Special Week? Is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, it's nothing! I'm gonna eat some dinner. 
It's already dark outside, so be careful! See you later…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh no. If I don't leave now…

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm, Suzuka? You're going running at this hour?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um… I don't plan on going very far, so if I leave right now, 
I should be back in time before curfew…

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Of all the— People like you really are trouble. I'm tagging along.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You're letting me run?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You were prohibited from running for quite a while, so… it's not 
like I don't understand your urge to get back out there.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(The streetlights flicker… and though the days 
may still be hot, the breeze at night is so cool…)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (It all feels… so good.)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Phew… Let's take a breather, Suzuka. How's your leg? 
Does anything feel off?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine. My injury was only a sprain, after all. 
I think it was excessive to have me stop running.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't think lightly of injuries you incur while racing. 
Even the smallest injury could hurt your racing career.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's true, but… it was so hard not being able to run.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I often found myself jealous of the others. I'd lose 
track of time just watching them run.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
So all those odd complaints expressed to the student 
council about "feeling watched" were because of you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'd also dream of running, and my legs must have been actually
moving while I slept. I would wake up with my futon and covers 
all a mess.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You were pretty lucky you had no roommates 
to witness your alarming sleeping habits.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I found myself spacing out in class, and when called on by the
teacher, I'd stand up and say, "I'm ready to run!"…

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: First off, you need to pay attention in class, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: N-Never mind that… The point is, I've been having a hard time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That isn't hard to imagine, given your 
stubborn obsession with running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it ironic? I came to this school and started entering 
races because I love running. But that's exactly what lead 
to my injury.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm…

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Oh… That break was a little too long. We have to 
get back before curfew. Let's go, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Pant… Phew.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Your form was a little sloppy, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I was just… distracted.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What, are you thinking racing doesn't matter 
so long as you can still run?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I believe there is a definite reason for you 
coming to Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Is there? What would that—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That is something you have to answer for yourself… 
It's getting cold. Let's head back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
(I… love running. All alone, I run on and on, always chasing 
after that peaceful scenery beyond.)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (But… isn't that something I can find while running on my own?)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: (In that case… why did I come to this school to race?)
